title: AE2 TEXTURE BACKPORT
description:
New Applied Energistics 2 Textures For Earlier versions of Minecraft!

This is a simple backport of the texture changes that were made in the Applied Energistics 2 update for Minecraft 1.21.
body:
# NEW AE2 TEXTURES FOR OLDER MC VERSIONS!

A backoport of the new Applied Energistics 2 textures from Minecraft version 1.21.x.
This pack is designed to bring the new versions from the AE2 mod into the previous versions of Minecraft for you to use in your world!

---

**NOTE**: These are textures pulled from the updated AE2 mod for MC 1.21!

**See Original Mod Here:** [https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)

---

### Stay Tuned For Updates!

---
